name: Divorce Ke Liye Kuch Bhi Karega
original_name: Divorce Ke Liye Kuch Bhi Karega
overview: Reporters Nikki and Ashu are at loggerheads trying to become the next prime-time news anchor. Their competition takes a hilarious turn when a sting operation leads to an accidental marriage.
